### **Database Setup Instructions (Supabase)**

Before running the app, you need to set up the database table in your Supabase SQL Editor. Run the following SQL query to create the table and security policies:

```sql
-- Create a generic Key-Value store for user data
create table user_data (
  user_id uuid references auth.users not null,
  key text not null,
  data jsonb,
  updated_at timestamptz default now(),
  primary key (user_id, key)
);

-- Enable Row Level Security (RLS) to isolate user data
alter table user_data enable row level security;

-- Create policy to allow users to do everything with their own data
create policy "Users can manage their own data" 
on user_data 
for all 
using (auth.uid() = user_id)
with check (auth.uid() = user_id);
```
